vocab.meaning: tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt một chế độ (ăn uống/tập luyện)
vocab.example: I try to strictly adhere to a fitness regimen that combines both flexibility and strength training.

vocab.meaning: thu lại những thành quả/lợi ích
vocab.example: By staying consistent with my morning runs, I’ve begun to reap the rewards of increased stamina and focus.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái sức khỏe tối ưu
vocab.example: To achieve optimal well-being, I make sure to balance high-intensity workouts with adequate recovery time.

vocab.meaning: việc ăn uống có ý thức (chú ý đến chất lượng và lượng thực phẩm)
vocab.example: I’ve transitioned toward mindful consumption, opting for organic produce over processed snacks.

vocab.meaning: lối sống thụ động, ngồi nhiều
vocab.example: Regular stretching throughout the day is my primary defense against the dangers of a sedentary lifestyle.

vocab.meaning: phong độ đỉnh cao (thể chất hoặc tinh thần)
vocab.example: I monitor my macronutrient intake carefully to ensure my body is fueled for peak performance during gym sessions.

vocab.meaning: làm thức tỉnh/kích thích các giác quan
vocab.example: A cold plunge after a workout is incredibly effective to invigorate the senses and reduce muscle inflammation.

vocab.meaning: các biện pháp phòng ngừa (bệnh tật)
vocab.example: I view annual health screenings as essential preventative measures to catch any potential issues early.
Meditation has been instrumental in building the mental fortitude I need to handle high-pressure environments.
Drinking plenty of water and herbal teas helps to naturally detoxify the body and maintain clear skin.
